description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy shaped like a giraffe, featuring a whimsical and artistic pattern across its surface. The body is covered in a dark purple base with vibrant green and light brown floral and abstract designs, giving it a playful and decorative appearance. The giraffe has a long neck, two small horns (ossicones), and a short tail with a tuft at the end. Its legs are short and rounded, contributing to a soft, cuddly look. The eyes are simple and round, adding to its friendly and approachable character. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight and squeezable, ideal for children or as a decorative item in urban environments such as parks or play areas.
description: A plush giraffe stuffed toy with a dark purple base and green and brown floral patterns, featuring a long neck, short legs, and a tufted tail. Its soft, rounded form and simple facial features give it a playful and friendly appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the giraffe's long neck, rounded legs, and the detailed floral pattern on its body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetry of the giraffe's face, ossicones, and the central placement of the eyes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same long neck and body pattern, with the tail and legs visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the head, body, and the small tufted tail, with the pattern mirrored along the spine.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with simple round eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows. The overall look is gentle and approachable.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright on all four legs with the neck extended upward and the head slightly tilted to one side.
